name: Shells & Terminals
description: Shell environments, plugins, prompts and modern terminals

packages.name: oh-my-zsh
packages.description: Zsh framework with plugins and themes

commands: set -e && ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture) && URL=$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/PowerShell/PowerShell/releases/latest | grep -oE "https://[^\"]*powershell_[0-9.]+-1\.deb_${ARCH}\.deb" | head -1) && [ -n "$URL" ] && curl -fsSLo /tmp/powershell.deb "$URL" && apt-get install -y /tmp/powershell.deb && rm -f /tmp/powershell.deb

set -e && TAG=$(curl -Ls -o /dev/null -w %{url_effective} https://github.com/zellij-org/zellij/releases/latest | awk -F/ '{print $NF}') && ARCH=$(uname -m | sed -e 's/x86_64/x86_64/' -e 's/aarch64/aarch64/' -e 's/arm64/aarch64/') && curl -fsSLo /tmp/zellij.tar.gz "https://github.com/zellij-org/zellij/releases/download/${TAG}/zellij-${ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" && tar xzf /tmp/zellij.tar.gz -C /tmp zellij && install -m 755 /tmp/zellij /usr/local/bin/zellij && rm -f /tmp/zellij /tmp/zellij.tar.gz

set -e && TAG=$(curl -Ls -o /dev/null -w %{url_effective} https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi/releases/latest | awk -F/ '{print $NF}') && ARCH=$(uname -m | sed -e 's/x86_64/x86_64/' -e 's/aarch64/aarch64/' -e 's/arm64/aarch64/') && curl -fsSLo /tmp/yazi.zip "https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi/releases/download/${TAG}/yazi-${ARCH}-unknown-linux-gnu.zip" && unzip -qo /tmp/yazi.zip -d /tmp && install -m 755 /tmp/yazi-*/yazi /usr/local/bin/yazi && install -m 755 /tmp/yazi-*/ya /usr/local/bin/ya && rm -rf /tmp/yazi*

packages.name: zoxide
packages.description: Smarter cd that learns your habits

commands: set -e && TAG=$(curl -Ls -o /dev/null -w %{url_effective} https://github.com/ajeetdsouza/zoxide/releases/latest | awk -F/ '{print $NF}') && ARCH=$(uname -m | sed -e 's/x86_64/x86_64/' -e 's/aarch64/aarch64/' -e 's/arm64/aarch64/') && curl -fsSLo /tmp/zoxide.tar.gz "https://github.com/ajeetdsouza/zoxide/releases/download/${TAG}/zoxide-${TAG#v}-${ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" && tar xzf /tmp/zoxide.tar.gz -C /tmp zoxide && install -m 755 /tmp/zoxide /usr/local/bin/zoxide && rm -f /tmp/zoxide /tmp/zoxide.tar.gz

packages.name: eza
packages.description: Modern ls replacement with icons and git

commands: set -e && apt-get install -y gpg wget && mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings && wget -qO- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eza-community/eza/main/deb.asc | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/gierens.gpg && echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/gierens.gpg] http://deb.gierens.de stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/gierens.list && chmod 644 /etc/apt/keyrings/gierens.gpg /etc/apt/sources.list.d/gierens.list && apt-get update && apt-get install -y eza
set -e && curl https://mise.run | env MISE_INSTALL_PATH=/usr/local/bin/mise INSTALLER_NO_MODIFY_PATH=1 sh

set -e && apt-get install -y wget gpg && wget -qO- https://releases.warp.dev/linux/keys/warp.asc | gpg --dearmor > /tmp/warpdotdev.gpg && install -D -o root -g root -m 644 /tmp/warpdotdev.gpg /etc/apt/keyrings/warpdotdev.gpg && rm -f /tmp/warpdotdev.gpg && printf 'deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/warpdotdev.gpg] https://releases.warp.dev/linux/deb stable main
' > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/warpdotdev.list && apt-get update && apt-get install -y warp-terminal

set -e && REAL_HOME=$(getent passwd ${SUDO_USER:-$USER} | cut -d: -f6) && DEST="${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$REAL_HOME/.local/share}/warp-terminal" && mkdir -p "$DEST" && if [ ! -d "$DEST/themes/.git" ]; then git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/warpdotdev/themes.git "$DEST/themes"; else git -C "$DEST/themes" pull --ff-only; fi

set -e && REAL_HOME=$(getent passwd ${SUDO_USER:-$USER} | cut -d: -f6) && ZSH_CUSTOM="${ZSH_CUSTOM:-$REAL_HOME/.oh-my-zsh/custom}" && if [ ! -d "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions/.git" ]; then git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-autosuggestions "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions"; else git -C "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions" pull --ff-only; fi

set -e && REAL_HOME=$(getent passwd ${SUDO_USER:-$USER} | cut -d: -f6) && ZSH_CUSTOM="${ZSH_CUSTOM:-$REAL_HOME/.oh-my-zsh/custom}" && if [ ! -d "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting/.git" ]; then git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting"; else git -C "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting" pull --ff-only; fi
